Company.title: Company
Company.description: Represents a company or organization managed within the WorkSync application. Supports multi-company management.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Company entity.

name.description: The official name of the company.

address.description: The primary physical address of the company.

phoneNumber.description: The main contact phone number for the company.

email.description: The main contact email address for the company.

website.description: The official website URL for the company.

description.description: A brief description of the company.

Location.title: Location
Location.description: Represents a physical office or work site belonging to a company, enabling multi-location management.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Location entity.

companyId.description: Reference to the Company this location belongs to. (Relationship: Company 1:N Location)

name.description: The name of the location (e.g., 'Headquarters', 'Branch Office A').

address.description: The physical address of the location.

phoneNumber.description: The contact phone number for this location.

Department.title: Department
Department.description: Represents a department within a company, organizing employees into functional groups.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Department entity.

companyId.description: Reference to the Company this department belongs to. (Relationship: Company 1:N Department)

name.description: The name of the department (e.g., 'Human Resources', 'Engineering').

description.description: A brief description of the department's function.

Employee.title: Employee
Employee.description: Represents an individual employee within a company, including their personal details, contract, and role.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Employee entity.

companyId.description: Reference to the Company the employee works for. (Relationship: Company 1:N Employee)

locationId.description: Reference to the Location where the employee primarily works. (Relationship: Location 1:N Employee)

departmentId.description: Reference to the Department the employee belongs to. (Relationship: Department 1:N Employee)

email.description: The employee's professional email address, used for communication.

hireDate.description: The date the employee was hired.

terminationDate.description: The date the employee's employment was terminated, if applicable.

role.description: The employee's role within the application (e.g., 'admin', 'employee', 'manager'). This determines access permissions.

isActive.description: Indicates if the employee is currently active and employed.

restStartTime.description: Start of rest time slot on working days (HH:MM).

restEndTime.description: End of rest time slot on working days (HH:MM).

weeklyHours.description: Weekly working hours (e.g., 20 for part-time, 40 for full-time).

autoClockIn.description: If true, the employee is included in automatic clock-in generation.

ModificationRequest.title: ModificationRequest
ModificationRequest.description: Represents a modification request for stock or items sent by an employee.

UtilityInfo.title: UtilityInfo
UtilityInfo.description: Useful information provided by the administration to all employees.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: A notification for a user or admin.

recipientId.description: Employee ID or 'ADMIN' for all admins.

definition.description: Requests for stock/item modifications sent by the employee.
Collection of useful information for all users.
